content: Activate this service to allow paid backups using your wallet balance

comment.text: This text appears as a message prompting the user to activate a service. It encourages enabling a paid backup feature using their wallet balance, likely displayed within a settings or service management section. Translators should convey the action needed to enable paid backups.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation contains a grammatical error in the possessive construction ('lompakkoosi saldoa' instead of 'lompakkosaldoasi' or 'lompakkosi saldoa'), which makes the sentence sound unnatural and technically incorrect in Finnish.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Aktivoi tämä palvelu mahdollistaaksesi maksulliset varmuuskopioinnit käyttämällä lompakkosi saldoa

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains several semantic errors: 'paketi' (package) instead of 'service', 'maksas atsargāšanu' (payment safeguarding/protection) instead of 'paid backups', and 'makdienas saldos' (nonsensical word, likely a typo for 'maciņš' or 'maksa') instead of 'wallet balance'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Aktivizējiet šo pakalpojumu, lai ļautu veikt maksas atsākumu, izmantojot jūsu e-tākmņa saldo

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation is grammatically incomplete and nonsensical. It translates to 'Activate this service to pay backup using your wallet balance', but the word 'backups' (the noun) is treated as a verb or is missing its object, making the sentence 'to pay backup' rather than 'to allow paid backups'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ඔබගේ පසුම්බි ශේෂය භාවිතයෙන් ගෙවන ලද උපස්ථ (backups) ලබා ගැනීමට මෙම සේවාව සක්‍රිය කරන්න

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical gender error: 'peňaženky' (feminine) is used with the possessive pronoun 'vášho' (masculine/neuter), which makes the sentence grammatically incorrect in Slovak.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Aktívujte túto službu, aby ste mohli používať platené zálohovanie z vašej peňaženky

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'vašosti' is a grammatical error/nonsense in this context. It seems to be a mistranslation of 'balance' or a corruption of 'stanje'. 'Denarnega vašosti' is not a valid Slovenian phrase.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Aktivirajte storitev, da omogočite plačane kopije z vašim stanjem v denarnici

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation adds 'crypto-wallet' (крипто-џењета), which is not present in the source English text. The source only mentions 'wallet balance'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Активирајте ову услугу да омогућите плаћене резервне копије користећи баланс вашег новчаника

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'wallet' is misspelled as 'валітету' (valitetu), which is not a valid Ukrainian word. It should be 'гаманця' (hamanetsia).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Активуйте цю послугу, щоб дозволити платне резервне копіювання за допомогою балансу гаманця
